summary: Fixed secondary room filter in dashboard (all-week + single-week) and Excel export. The single-week path's Prisma query did not include additionalRooms, so additionalRoomIds was missing from the response. Now both paths return additionalRoomIds and the room filter matches primary OR secondary rooms.

rootCause.secondaryRoomFilterRootCause: getEffectiveScheduleForWeek (single-week API path) did not include additionalRooms in its Prisma query, so additionalRoomIds was never returned. The dashboard room filter for single-week could only match item.roomId (primary), missing secondary rooms.
rootCause.whyPrimaryRoomWorked: The Prisma where.roomId = targetId query matched primary room. The in-memory filter also matched item.roomId === targetId. Both paths worked for primary rooms.
rootCause.whySecondaryRoomFailed: The single-week path didn't include additionalRooms, so additionalRoomIds was undefined. The filter item.additionalRoomIds?.includes(targetId) returned false (undefined?.includes = false). The all-week path worked after K34-A3B but single-week still failed.

filesModified.change: getEffectiveScheduleForWeek now includes additionalRooms in Prisma query, emits additionalRoomIds, and builds composite roomName
Prisma include additionalRooms, in-memory room filter checks additionalRoomIds, secondary-room Prisma query for missing slots, composite cell text

validation.k22C: 68 pass, 5 FAIL (pre-existing from K34-A3 combined capacity, NOT a K34-A3C regression)

manualSteps: Restart dev server: taskkill /PID 4556 /F && npm run dev
Filter by room 11-322 — multi-room course shows

Export Excel with room 10-104 — multi-room course in export

closureDecision.recommendedNextStage: K22-C fixture update (out of scope for K34-A3C) or K34-B
